name: Absolutely Easy and Absolutely Delicious Chocolate Torte
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Line the bottom and side of a greased 9-inch springform pan with aluminum foil.
Melt butter or margarine and chocolate in the top of a double boiler, then cool.
In a bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until pale yellow.
Mix cooled butter or margarine, chocolate, and yolk mixture. Add nuts.
Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Fold into chocolate mixture.
Place pan with water on bottom shelf of preheated oven. (Keeps torte moist.)
Pour in filling and bake for 45-50 minutes. Let sit a few minutes in the pan before unmolding.
Unmold onto plate, turning upside down to remove foil.
Sprinkle with granulated sugar ground in food processor. (Confectioner's sugar contains cornstarch and is not Kosher for Passover.) Alternatively, use Kosher for Passover confectioner's sugar.
